source_meta.source_document: Pinnacle Acetabular Cup System Surgical Technique

systems.system_notes: Revision acetabular construct anchored to official Pinnacle cup product and surgical-technique materials, with sector augment reconstruction support.

trays.tray_notes: Official Pinnacle revision materials support dedicated acetabular instrumentation for cup preparation and augment-enabled reconstruction workflows.

components.component_notes: Official Pinnacle materials describe the revision acetabular shell family used in reconstructive hip surgery.
Sector augment reconstruction component used to address acetabular bone loss within the Pinnacle revision construct.
Official Pinnacle materials describe compatible liner and bearing options used with the revision acetabular construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current Pinnacle source set confirms revision acetabular shell and augment families but this pass does not expand the full sector-augment and shell code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper revision catalogue or implant listing pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
